audience_policies.source_phrase: The discount pass admits 2 adults at a reduced admission rate of $12.00 per person any day the museum is open. Children under 16 are always free. With the discount pass patrons may reserve discounted tickets at my.pem.org/events or by calling the PEM reservation line at 978-542-1

coupon.source_phrase_block: The discount pass admits 2 adults at a reduced admission rate of $12.00 per person any day the museum is open. Children under 16 are always free. With the discount pass patrons may reserve discounted tickets at my.pem.org/events or by calling the PEM reservation line at 978-542-1511. Admission to Yin Yu Tang the Chinese House and special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee. Please make sure to review health and safety requirements before your visit.
